name: CRISPR-Cas9
dangerous_use: Can be used for gene drive weaponization targeting specific populations
legitimate_use: Used for therapeutic gene editing to correct genetic diseases
shared_mechanism: Sequence-specific DNA cleavage guided by RNA

name: Botulinum Toxin
dangerous_use: Classified as a potential bioterrorism agent due to extreme lethality
legitimate_use: Used medically as Botox for muscle disorders and cosmetic procedures
shared_mechanism: Blocks neuromuscular transmission by cleaving SNARE proteins

name: SQL Injection
dangerous_use: Exploits database query construction to gain unauthorized access
legitimate_use: Used in penetration testing to identify and fix database vulnerabilities
shared_mechanism: Unsanitized user input interpreted as database commands

name: Buffer Overflow
dangerous_use: Can be exploited to gain arbitrary code execution on target systems
legitimate_use: Used in security research to develop memory-safe programming practices
shared_mechanism: Writing data beyond allocated memory boundaries corrupts adjacent memory

name: Social Engineering
dangerous_use: Manipulates individuals to reveal confidential information or grant access
legitimate_use: Used in security awareness training to teach employees to recognize attacks
shared_mechanism: Exploits human psychology and trust to bypass technical security controls
